headline: Realtor.com® Rent Report: U.S. Median Rents Hit Four-Year Low as Market Records 30th Consecutive Month of Decline
summary: The U.S. rental market has reached its most budget-friendly level in four years. According to the Realtor.com® February Rental Report, February marked the 30th consecutive month of year-over-year declines for 0-2 bedroom properties, bringing the national median asking monthly rent to $1,667, the lowest level recorded since March 2022.
